Task 2:
2010 – Shanghai expo - see exhibits and innovation
History over WE bringing people tgt
3 stages of history

Definition of WE: international exhibition
1 country is the host – 2 majot things
- design the theme =? Gives its gocus
- invite other countries

History of WE – 3 main stage
1 phase: insturial and tech invenstions 1851-1938
Fist 1851 – London England – the great exhibition – improving industry and farming
10 countries including China – display
6.3M visitors
Several major achievements => grew the biggest flower in the world – child can stand on its leaf

2 phase: Raising awareness of farming techniques => huge benefits
Focus of cultural exchange 1939-1987=> themes focus more on important
1939 New York => theme: city of tmr
To show => huge display on model food, latest works of arts => culture + food => 50 countries +44m ppl visitors

Third stage => nation branding => 1988 – now
The host countries and all participating => promote themselves
Handover of Germany => nature and tech
Env-frley products and inventions
155 countries
Only ??? millions => failure

• Put all main headings in red instead of black.

Part B:
Few things to run through for the Victoria Cup

Concern:
- the weather is so hot and humid in Hong Kong => may get ill
- decided that the players can taker longer breaks between games => 8 mins
- the player schedule => all matches will be played in evening => avoid heat in afternoon
- Air quality: pollution level in HK is really high => difficult to breath
- if the API > 200, can use an indoor court
- All people will appreciate that
- Behaviour of the fans=> the fans were talking really loudly during the game => disrupting
- if any fans brakes the rules => they will be removed from the venue
- members of local tennis clubs will be able to book the ticket

- teaching some young hk fans => tennis activity day
- Aged requirement 12-16 YO => teenagers
- select them: the girl can help with that
- let her do, send her details

Local charity
- making donations to both of them
- donate HKD .5 million to both -> use the money to set a gym -> the Lora teranover Gym -> curtesy visit during the tournament

Ads for Tournament
- the girl is the highest ranking player => should appear on the poster
- pass the msg to the PR dept
- Antony phone number for play inquiry 00852 17475362
